# L37 — Provider fallback decision matrix

Use this matrix during **incident triage** and **architecture reviews**. It does **not** override code: see `L21_PROVIDER_FALLBACK.md` and `deliveryAdapter.js` for actual routing.

**Legend — severity:** SEV1 highest customer/financial exposure; scale aligns with internal incident docs when available.

| Scenario | Detection source | Severity | Fallback action (operational) | Customer impact | Support action | Money-path risk | Rollback / kill-switch | Evidence required | Owner | NO-GO |
|----------|------------------|----------|-------------------------------|-----------------|----------------|-----------------|------------------------|-------------------|-------|-------|
| **Provider timeout** | App logs, HTTP client timeout metrics, SLA breach flags | SEV2–SEV3 | Do **not** assume failure; trigger **inquiry** / reconciliation path; pause bulk retries if duplicate risk | “Processing” / delayed delivery | Status update template; do not promise delivery time | **High** if blind retry | Disable bulk replay; hold new high-risk retries; consider outbound pause per runbook | Inquiry result, correlation ids, timeline | Eng on-call + Provider liaison | Disabling inquiry-before-retry in prod without approval |
| **Provider 5xx** | HTTP status, provider error body (redacted) | SEV2 | Exponential backoff per policy; circuit may open; **no** mock chain in prod for live Reloadly | Delayed fulfillment | Communicate delay; offer refund **only** per policy | Medium–High | Same as timeout; scale checkout freeze if systemic | Error rate dashboard slice, sample trace ids | Eng on-call | Enabling mock fulfillment for paid customers |
| **Provider auth failure** | `reloadly_not_configured`, 401/403 mappings, startup validation | SEV1 | **Stop** assuming delivery; fix secrets via **secret rotation** (out of band); no customer promises | Fulfillment halted | Switch to incident comms; disable new purchases if needed | **High** (paid queue without delivery) | Kill outbound; verify no new captures if systemic | Redacted config presence check output | Platform + Security | Rotating keys **without** revocation plan |
| **Provider quota exceeded** | 429/rate-limit signals, vendor notice | SEV2 | Throttle checkout; shed load; request limit increase from vendor | Queued/delayed orders | Set expectations; prioritize oldest paid | Medium | Rate limit + queue depth metrics | Vendor ticket id, throttle config change record | SRE + AM | Silently continuing at full rate |
| **Duplicate fulfillment risk** | Duplicate `customIdentifier` concern, inquiry mismatch, retry after timeout | SEV1 | **Halt** automated retries; manual reconciliation; **one** compensating path after proof | Possible double credit / dispute | Senior support + finance | **Critical** | Freeze retries; incident commander | Inquiry artifacts, idempotency audit | Eng + Finance | “Retry until success” without inquiry |
| **Wrong-denomination risk** | Mapping error, operator id mismatch, catalog drift | SEV1 | **Freeze** affected SKUs; block new orders for operator; reconcile delivered vs paid | Wrong value delivered | Refund/compensation per policy | High | Remove SKU from sale; hotfix mapping | Operator map version diff | Product + Eng | Guessing operator ids in prod |
| **Delayed confirmation** | State machine stuck in verifying/pending | SEV3 | Run reconciliation endpoints; provider report pull where allowed | Long-running “processing” | Proactive outreach if SLA missed | Medium | None destructive; optional feature flag review | Before/after state, admin query results | Support + Eng | Marking delivered without provider proof |
| **Stuck fulfillment** | Admin reconciliation lists, worker DLQ | SEV2 | Inspect attempt row, Stripe PI state, provider reference; manual recovery per authority matrix | Stuck “paid” | Ticket + callback | Medium–High | Pause worker if poison message | Order timeline export | Eng on-call | Manual DB edits bypassing invariants |
| **Refund / dispute conflict** | Stripe webhook, dispute opened while fulfillment pending | SEV2 | Coordinate **Stripe outcome** with **provider state**; no double compensation | Refund or loss dispute | Finance-approved response | **Critical** if both credit and refund | Freeze automated provider retries for that order | Linked Stripe + provider refs | Finance + Eng | Issuing refund **and** leaving fulfillment running |
| **Reconciliation drift** | Mismatch between ledger expectation and provider reports | SEV2 | Batch reconciliation job; quarantine suspect orders | Incorrect trust UI / support answers | Hold mass comms until scope known | High | Read-only analysis first; then governed fixes | Reconciliation report (redacted) | Finance + Eng | Bulk SQL “fixes” without audit |
